title: Vortal tree

The '''vortal tree''' was a type of [[Tree/Legends|tree]] that grew in [[Jungle/Legends|jungles]] on the [[Planet/Legends|planet]] [[Bestal Three]] of<ref name="Polyhedron" /> the [[Outer Rim Territories/Legends|Outer Rim Territories']] [[Varada sector/Legends|Varada sector]].<ref name="EAOC">{{SW|url=news/star-wars-the-essential-atlas-online-companion|text=''Star Wars: The Essential Atlas'' Online Companion|int=Star Wars: The Essential Atlas Online Companion}} — Based on corresponding data for [[Bestal system/Legends|Bestal system]]</ref> It had crusty [[Seed/Legends|seeds]] from which healing [[Stimulant/Legends|stimulants]] could be made.<ref name="Polyhedron" />

During the existence of the [[New Republic/Legends|New Republic]], the company [[Fax Ventures]] harvested vortal tree seeds on Bestal Three. Using the stimulants made from the seeds, the company created [[Medpac/Legends|medpacs]], the effectiveness of which was twenty-five percent higher than that of standard medpacs, such as those manufactured by the [[SoroSuub Corporation/Legends|SoroSuub Corporation]]. Not long before Fax Ventures would begin marketing its new medpacs, the company was covering up the vortal tree seed harvesting by processing on the planet [[aluminite]] and [[corvax]] [[Ore/Legends|ores]] [[Mining/Legends|mined]] at the nearby [[Kadal Asteroid Field]]—a highly-profitable venture the lucrativeness of which was nevertheless less pronounced than that of the medpac manufacture.<ref name="Polyhedron" />

==Behind the scenes==
The vortal tree was introduced in "[[Adversaries: Characters for the Star Wars: New Republic Campaign]]," a [[roleplaying game]] source article authored by [[Bill Slavicsek]] for use with [[West End Games]]' ''[[Star Wars: The Roleplaying Game]]'' and published in the [[Polyhedron 97|ninety-seventh issue]] of the ''[[Polyhedron]]'' magazine in [[July]] [[1994]]. Since that article was released outside of the [[Lucas Licensing]] process,<ref name="Polyhedron" /> it was considered non-[[canon]]ical with respect to the [[Star Wars Legends|''Star Wars'' Legends]] continuity.<ref name="UnlicensedStatus">{{UnlicensedStatus}}</ref>
